title: Departmental divisions
doc_html:
§257. Departmental divisions

            Departmental divisions shall be administered by division chiefs, who shall be appointed by the secretary.

            Acts 2019, No. 390, §1.
doc_text:
§257.  Departmental divisions
Departmental divisions shall be administered by division chiefs, who shall be
appointed by the secretary.
Acts 2019, No. 390, §1.
